name: Oven Bay Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Backfin or lump crabmeat (popped over)
2 tsp Old Bay seasoning (or other standard seafood seasoning)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Bake potatoes at 350°F for one hour or until tender. Allow them to cool completely.
3. Cut each potato in half lengthwise and scoop out the pulp, leaving the shell intact. Set the pulp aside.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the crabmeat, green pepper, onion, mayonnaise, dry mustard, spicy mustard, paprika, and Old Bay seasoning.
5. Place potato skins on a cookie sheet. Spoon equal amounts of crab mixture into each potato half.
6. Top the crab mixture with the potato filling.
7. Sprinkle the remaining Old Bay seasoning over the potato halves.
8. Bake at 350°F for 5 to 10 minutes, or until heated through but not dried out.
9. Remove from oven and pour melted butter over the potato halves.
